message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "operator-framework: Metrics of the Cluster scoped operator causes can't list unstructured object errors",
+    "description": "Metrics of the Cluster scoped operator causes can't list unstructured object errors. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify operator-framework troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your operator-framework deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review operator-framework configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework\n```\n**What did you do?**\n\nCreated an operator with operator sdk."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Metrics of the Cluster scoped operator causes can't list…",
+        "description": "I could check and reproduce which shows be this scenario.  Following the detailed information. \n\n**Scenario**\n- Create a go project as described in the [QuickStart](https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk#create-and-deploy-an-app-operator)\n- Then, apply the required changes for the\n```yaml\nE0822 17:26:58.302751       1 reflector.go:134] pkg/mod/k8s.io/client-go@v0.0.0-20190228174230-b40b2a5939e4/tools/cache/reflector.go:95: Failed to list *unstructured.Unstructured: the server could not find the requested resource\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Metrics of the Cluster scoped operator causes… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework -n operator-framework --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I could check and reproduce which shows be this scenario.  Following the detailed information. \n\n**Scenario**\n- Create a go project as described in the [QuickStart](https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk#create-and-deploy-an-app-operator)\n- Then, apply the required changes for the operator to become cluster-scope.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "E0822 17:26:58.302751       1 reflector.go:134] pkg/mod/k8s.io/client-go@v0.0.0-20190228174230-b40b2a5939e4/tools/cache/reflector.go:95: Failed to list *unstructured.Unstructured: the server could not find the requested resource",
+        "**Environment**\n* operator-sdk version:",
+        "* go version:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
